references.text: Chunxiang, L, L Shugang, S Xiaoyan & Y Qun. 2011. Phylogenetic positions of the enigmatic Asiatic fern genera Diplaziopsis and Rhachidosorus from analyses of four plastid genes. American Fern Journal 101: 142-155.
